action.reasoning: Observation: RF baseline achieved MAE 0.219 (val 0.219). Analysis: Morgan FP+RF is solid but limited capacity for QM9 electronic property; NN can capture nonlinear patterns better (expected MAE drop to ~0.16 range). Decision: Replace RF with torch MLP (2 hidden layers, BN, dropout) on same FP inputs; train 20 epochs with Adam+L1, log per-epoch val_mae to metrics.jsonl, save best.pt, submit_eval immediately for score/timing before further scaling (e.g. to 3D GNN or Mordred).
